262.reason: [Error: The condition only checks for "if", "for", "break", and "return", but Stmt() can also start with other tokens like "printf", "continue", "{", ";", or an LVal. This causes the while loop to skip these cases, leading to incorrect parsing or infinite loop.]

This causes the while loop to skip these cases, leading to incorrect parsing or infinite loop.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: The Grammer function does not handle all possible starting tokens of Stmt, such as '{', ';', 'printf', identifiers (for LVal '=' ...), etc. This will cause the while loop to skip these tokens without processing them, leading to incorrect parsing or infinite loop.]
